title: WAGNER Steam Wallpaper Stripper SteamForce, 4 L Capacity, Steaming Time Max. 70 Min, 3,7 M Hose, 2.000 W, 230 V
features: Quick and easy stripping of old wallpaper with water vapour using steam
Simply plug it in, let it heat up and get started (no on / off switch available)
100 percent environmentally friendly, no chemical additives
Long steaming times allow uninterrupted steaming of large areas (max. steam time 70 min.)
Safe working thanks to heat-insulated hose and clever valve system

We recommend descaling our wallpaper steamers after every 6th use. How often you have to descale a device depends significantly on the water hardness. You can determine this using a water hardness test, which can be purchased in DIY stores or online.
description: From the manufacturer Wagner SteamForce The best solution for removing old wallpaper Comfortable wallpaper stripping - thanks to the SteamForce steam wallpaper remover. Use the power of steam for the easy removal of wallpaper without chemical additives. A wide reach and safety while working thanks to the 3.7 m long heat-insulated hose. The advantages of steam wallpaper stripper Practical carrying handle For convenient change of workstation Lightweight steam plate For fatigue-free work 3.7 m long hose For comfortable use Large filling opening With safety valve - prevents hot steam from escaping during refilling Remove wallpaper easily with WAGNER steam wallpaper strippers 1. Prepare device Easy use: After covering the floors with foil, fill the device with water. Then turn on the device. 2. Moisten wallpaper Now the machine heats the water and directs the steam to the steam plate. Put steam plate on the wallpaper, wait a few seconds, then move. 3. Simply peel off wallpaper Finally, you just need to peel the wallpaper from the wall. With a steam device large pieces or even entire sheets can be removed. Steaming time max. 70 min. 4 l Reservoir capacity 4 l 2,000 W Power consumption 2,000 W 3,7 m Hose length 3,7 m Big steam plate Accessories Big steam plate 28 x 20 cm Big steam plate size 28 x 20 cm - Small steam plate - Previous page Wagner SteamForce Plus Learn More Wagner SteamForce Learn More Next page How much time does my wallpaper steamer need to heat up? Depending on the amount of water in the container, it can take up to 12 minutes for the system to generate steam. A full container generates steam for around 85 minutes. How often do I have to discale my wallpaper steamer? We recommend descaling our wallpaper steamers after every 6th use. How often you have to descale a device depends significantly on the water hardness. You can determine this using a water hardness test, which can be purchased in DIY stores or online. My wallpaper steamer no longer heats up or switches off after a short time - what can I do? Descale the device-Limescale can settle on the heating element&insulate it. As a result, the heating element can no longer give off sufficient heat to the water. The temperature at the heating element continues to rise&the steamer switches itself off Are there any other applications for the wallpaper steamer? No. The device is not designed for any other applications. Is it helpful to make incisions in the wallpaper or to puncture it before removing it using steam? In the case of multi-layered and painted wallpapers, incisions or perforations can ensure that the steam can penetrate through the layer. This makes the wallpaper peel off more easily.
